commit.message:
fix(test): patch API fallback in project_context tests for Postgres

In Postgres test mode, stale dependency_overrides on the module-level
FastAPI app allow _resolve_default_project_from_api() to query a live
database and return 'test-project' even when the test sets
default_project=None. Monkeypatch the async fallback in the three
affected tests to isolate config-based resolution from API leakage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: phernandez <paul@basicmachines.co>

commit.message:
Add logo throughout site (#22)

* Add logo image throughout site with favicon and OG meta tags

Replace text-based title with logo PNG, add favicon/apple-touch-icon,
and Open Graph meta tags for social sharing previews.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix logo transparency and increase size

Remove baked-in checker background from logo PNG, making it truly
transparent. Increase logo height from h-20 to h-36. Regenerate
favicon, apple-touch-icon, and og-image from corrected source.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Improve logo background removal with flood-fill and edge erosion

Use connected-component flood fill from image edges to identify
background, then erode 2px to eliminate gray fringe artifacts.
Much cleaner on dark backgrounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Make interior letter gaps transparent (L/A, A/S in CLASH)

Remove all bright/gray regions matching the checker pattern, not just
edge-connected ones, so gaps between letters also become transparent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Preserve white letter fills while making letter gaps transparent

Use region size to distinguish: small interior bg regions (letter gaps
between L/A, A/S) become transparent, large ones (white fills in
CROSSWORD letters) stay opaque.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix logo: remove erosion (fixes pixelation), catch L/A gap

Drop the 2px erosion that was damaging letter edges in CROSSWORD.
Raise interior region size threshold to 4500px so the L/A letter
gap (3476px) becomes transparent while white letter fills (5000+px)
are preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Defringe logo edges for cleaner rendering on dark backgrounds

Fade out bright/gray pixels in the 2px boundary zone adjacent to
transparent areas, reducing the visible halo without eroding into
letter content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Fix currency symbol mismatch on tour cards (₹50 → $50)

The 'Starting from' price picked the lowest price numerically across options
(e.g. 50 from a USD option) but displayed the tour's own currency symbol
(INR → ₹), showing ₹50 instead of $50.

Fix: track lowestCurrency alongside lowestPrice. When comparing options in
different currencies, convert to USD first (INR/85) so the cheapest option
wins correctly. Display symbol now matches the winning option's currency.

Applied to both CityPage.tsx and CityPage_bilal.tsx.

feat(core): skills system, MCP stdio transport, search_tools, edit_file

Skills (core/agent/skills.py):
- Scans built-in /app/skills/ + workspace .agents/skills/ / .claude/skills/
- Parses SKILL.md frontmatter (name, description)
- Injects skills table into system prompt automatically
- npx skills ecosystem: find/add commands documented in system prompt

Default skills (core/skills/):
- github: gh CLI for issues, PRs, CI runs
- weather: weather lookups
- tmux: session management
- coding-agent: delegate to Claude Code / Codex
- nano-pdf: PDF creation
- openai-whisper-api: audio transcription

MCP (core/tools/mcp.py):
- Subprocess stdio transport (JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdin/stdout)
- Config: workspace/mcp_servers.json or /data/mcp_servers.json
- Dynamic tool discovery (tools/list on startup)
- Tools exposed as mcp_{server}_{tool_name}
- Example config in config-template/mcp_servers.json

search_tools (core/tools/search_tools.py):
- Searches builtins + MCP tools + installed skills by keyword
- Returns matches with source tag [builtin] / [mcp:server] / [skill]
- Falls back to suggesting npx skills find <query>

edit_file (core/tools/edit.py):
- Targeted string replacement (no full rewrite)
- Validates old_text exists, warns on multiple matches
- replace_all=true for renaming/global replacements

System prompt updated:
- Tool discovery pattern: search_tools → npx skills find → npx skills add
- MCP tools section with mcp_servers.json config pointer
- Improved persona (casual Russian, DaisyMobile style examples)
- Security: confirmation required list, injection warning

Add cooldown dedup for recurring threshold/update events

Events like update_available, disk_high, and mem_high were being
created on every telemetry push, flooding the events table. Now
uses an in-memory cooldown map to suppress duplicates: 24h for
update_available, 1h for disk/memory threshold alerts, 15m default.
Device online/offline and Docker events are unaffected.

commit.message:
Fix JT10/JT30 level routing — was setting engine voice level instead of node output

tweak_jt10/tweak_jt30 level param was going through the generic param conversion
loop, which converted dB to a 0-1 engine voice level and stored it in _params.
This meant: (1) level=75 got clamped to 6dB max → engine 1.0 = MAXIMUM instead
of reduced, (2) mute stored raw -60 as engine value causing inverted audio,
(3) the mixer's node output gain was never actually changed.

Now level routes through session.set('jt10.level', dB) → InstrumentNode.setLevel(),
which is what the mixer uses for gain staging. Also fixed JT90 mute to use proper
toEngine() conversion. Added JB202 status note to CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add debug logging to Google Calendar auth flow

Logs at callback (token exchange, DB upsert), status (query result),
and client hook (query param detection, connection state changes).
Check server logs and browser console to trace where the flow breaks.

commit.message:
fix: route edge cleaning to color_knockout instead of edit_image

Generative AI models (Qwen) cannot handle pixel-level alpha operations
and produce gradient artifacts when asked to clean edges. Update system
prompt to direct the AI to use color_knockout with transparency mode
for semi-transparent pixel cleanup — a deterministic tool that actually
works for this purpose.

Speed up Vol A: enable disk cache for override questions

Override questions (~12k entries) were re-rendering from Excel on every
restart. Now they check the disk HTML cache first and save to it after
rendering — matching the behaviour of non-override questions.
Also triggers background rendering of remaining sheets from the same file
so sibling questions are warm for subsequent requests.

Add line break to playbooks.html hero h1 "The IMPACT System
in action." Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6

fix: Jobb Fokus prompt-ordning, DIREKT-def och MAX_TOKENS

- Flippar prompt-ordningen: CV kommer FÖRE rollistan så att Claude läser
  hela CV:t med systemprompten i minnet, sedan ser rollerna precis före
  svaret (recency = alla roller får lika fokus, ingen bottom-of-list bias)
- Direktiv upprepas både tidigt (primacy) och precis före instruktioner
  (recency) för att "fokusera på direkt match" faktiskt respekteras
- Stärker DIREKT-definitionen: välj alltid den HÖGSTA kategorin som CV:t
  stöder, nedgradera inte om bevis finns – explicit anti-downgrade-regel
- Lägger till explicit stöd för engelska CV:n i system-prompten
- Höjer MAX_TOKENS 1500→2500 så svar med 30 roller aldrig trunkeras

commit.message:
Fix: handle empty/plain DATABASE_URL without crashing at import time

- Use `or` so an empty-string DATABASE_URL falls back to the dev default
  instead of passing "" to create_async_engine (which raises ArgumentError)
- Auto-upgrade postgresql:// -> postgresql+asyncpg:// for Railway's
  PostgreSQL service which provisions plain postgres:// URLs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Notion-style annotations, trim to 6 terms, soften nav pill

- Replace hand-drawn SVG scribble with clean annotation style:
  1.5px underline + 10% warm background, editorial not decorative
- Reduce annotated terms from 10 → 6 highest-expertise signals:
  'AI-powered marketing infrastructure', 'autonomous pipelines',
  'automatically not manually', 'understanding human behavior',
  'from zero', 'objection patterns'
- Remove annotation from italic hero sentence entirely
- Soften AI Infrastructure nav: plain accent-colored text + icon,
  no pill border or background, consistent dark/light mode

Smart context loader: decay-weighted queries, signal-aware retrieval, compressed output, dual-write

- Memory briefing uses exponential decay scoring (feedback_score * exp(-decay_lambda * age))
- Signal extraction from git branch, recent files, and epics.db for tech-relevant queries
- Correction patterns grouped by theme with counts instead of individual entries
- Unprocessed sessions limited to last 3 with summary line for rest (46 lines, was 200+)
- Stop hook dual-writes corrections/outcomes to OpenMemory via direct SQL INSERT

Fix compiletime_1D_eps on Clang and MSVC C4244 in batch_verify

- Guard compiletime_1D_eps example to GCC-only (constexpr eps overload
  relies on a GCC extension).
- Generalize batch_verify to deduce callable and input types, avoiding
  implicit narrowing through std::function that triggered MSVC C4244
  in type_traits. Use batch_verify<float> with float data directly.

Update dependencies: Django 5.2 LTS, Pillow 11, remove unused packages

- Pillow ^10.3.0 -> ^11.1 (security fixes)
- Migrate STATICFILES_STORAGE/DEFAULT_FILE_STORAGE to STORAGES dict
- Migrate pytz to stdlib zoneinfo
- Fix SIMPLE_JWT config for simplejwt (was using old rest_framework_jwt keys)
- Remove USE_L10N (default since Django 4.0)
- Remove unused: google-cloud-vision, pytz, ordereddict, html2markdown,
  zipp, uwsgi

commit.message:
Update ffi gem 1.17.2 → 1.17.3 (1.17.2 was yanked from RubyGems)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace NLI pipeline with keyword-based SDG classifier

Zero-shot NLI inference over 300+ chunks on a free-tier CPU takes hours.
Replaced with TF-IDF-style keyword matching that classifies all chunks
in <1 second with no model download. Same interface, same return format.
Suitable for ESG domain where SDG keywords are well-established.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

security: CORS same-origin, READONLY_MODE default-ON, CSP tightened, legacy auth deleted

- Remove mallan67.github.io from production CORS (same-origin only in prod)
- READONLY_MODE defaults ON (must set =false to enable writes)
- assertWriteAllowed() guard on all 27 mutation API routes
- Delete legacy /app/agent/ pages (deprecated Bearer auth, XSS-vulnerable)
- Add noindex,nofollow meta to all 9 CRM HTML files
- Fix CRM robots tag from index,follow to noindex,nofollow
- Remove googletagmanager + unsplash from CSP (unused)
- Empty mock listing data arrays
- Update README + compliance docs for cookie-only auth

uploads due to missing/expired Google Cloud Vision credentials.
Also update Pillow API calls (_getexif -> getexif, Image.ROTATE_* ->
Image.Transpose.ROTATE_*) for Pillow 11 compatibility.
